mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in industrial production signals improving output and operating leverage, causing higher expected earnings revisions and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2010-06 was available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO growth has nonpositive average 20-day forward SPX returns or Rank IC below 0.03 in two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment is high and rising, household income risk and credit stress reduce equity risk appetite, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 6-month moving average by >0.2pp while UNRATE > 8%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A near-zero federal funds rate combined with non-accelerating consumer prices lowers discount rates without forcing imminent tightening, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-rate low-inflation trigger has lower 60-day average SPX returns than periods with FEDFUNDS >= 0.5% or CPI inflation above the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales indicate improving final demand and revenue growth, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as cyclical earnings expectations rise.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2010-06 was available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS 3-month growth above 1% is followed by below-baseline 20-day SPX returns in at least half of walk-forward test years.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in housing starts signals weaker construction demand and household confidence, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST declines below the threshold are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of observations and the mean return exceeds baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth while unemployment remains elevated signals early-cycle labor healing before wage pressure emerges, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS and UNRATE 2010-06 vintages were available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-growth high-UNRATE condition has nonpositive mean 20-day SPX returns or no excess return versus high-UNRATE periods without payroll growth.

mechanism_narrative: Acceleration in consumer prices raises expected policy tightening and real-income pressure, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as discount-rate risk reprices quickly.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2010-05 was available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if CPI acceleration above 4% is followed by positive 5-day SPX returns in more than 55% of cases or if event-study abnormal returns are not negative.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth confirms broad demand recovery, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through higher aggregate earnings expectations.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth crosses above 2%
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value for 2010-01 was available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if GDP growth above 2% fails to deliver higher 60-day SPX returns than GDP growth below 2% in a walk-forward test or if Rank IC is negative.
